name: MedSmart Group Inc.
summary: MedSmart Group Inc. owns and operates a professional network of MedSmart wellness centers specializing in anti-aging treatments. Its services include testosterone replacement therapy, cryogen therapy, hormone restoration, hypothyroidism, allergies, high cholesterol, hypertension, diabetes, Smart Diet, vein treatment, laser hair removal, hair loss treatment, Medi-Fast program, and erectile dysfunction treatment. MedSmart Group Inc. is based in Bay Harbor Islands, Florida.
